---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ZIP CODE
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case Example
Show how the feature would be used:

```
You: <example user input>
ZIP CODE: <example expected behavior>
```

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.

## Are you willing to contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself
- [ ] Yes, with guidance from maintainers
- [ ] No, just suggesting
